name: Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Chicken And Carrot 50g
description: Spectrum Gusto Soup with Chicken and Carrot is a delicious 50g cat treat designed to keep cats healthy, hydrated, and satisfied. Made with real chicken breast and carrot in a savory fish broth, it provides essential nutrients and moisture. Ideal as a snack, daily reward, or meal topper, it’s perfect for cats and kittens of all ages. Key Features: Real chicken (25.4%) and carrot (4.7%) for natural flavor. High moisture content (90%) to support hydration. Savory fish broth encourages even picky cats to enjoy. Convenient 50g pouch for easy portioning. Suitable for cats and kittens of all ages. Ingredients: Water, Chicken Breast (25.4%), Carrot (4.7%), Fish Broth, Tapioca Starch (E1442), Guar Gum (E412) Nutritional Info (per pouch): Protein: 8%, Fat: 0.2%, Ash: 1%, Fiber: 0.1%, Moisture: 90% Feeding Guidelines: Serve with a spoon in small portions. Use as a treat, snack, or meal topper. Always provide fresh drinking water.
